description_long: This kiosk consists of a rectangular wooden structure with a two-tiered design, featuring a lighter wood tabletop and a slightly darker wood base. The upper surface displays promotional items, including two boxed pairs of white sneakers, a calendar or poster with athletic imagery, and a standing product display on one side. The lower tier serves as a platform for additional white sneakers, arranged in a row for easy viewing. The kiosk's frame is constructed from sturdy wood with open sides and a minimalist, geometric form. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on showcasing merchandise in an organized and accessible manner.
description: A modern, two-tiered wooden kiosk with a light tabletop, product displays, and sneakers arranged for retail presentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full display of sneakers, boxed items, and promotional signage on both tiers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk and the vertical arrangement of the product displays.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the kiosk, with sneakers and product boxes visible on both levels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the standing product display and the arrangement of sneakers along the length.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs and product boxes with images and text, placed on the tabletop and sides; includes a calendar/poster and branded packaging.
attribute_roof_design: Flat tabletop surface with no overhangs or decorative elements, constructed from light-colored wood.
